title: UCMS – Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident – 59 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 59 Posts
basic_details.short_information: University College of Medical Sciences (UCMS) Recruitment 2026 for 59 posts of Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident. Candidates with Postgraduate Degree or Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UCMS official website du.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: 40 years (relaxable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Govt. of India norms)

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology and Microbiology: MSc (Medical). For Dentistry: MDS Degree. For non-medical qualifications, Pay Matrix Level 7.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level 11 (Rs.67700-208700/-) for PG Degree/Diploma, Level 10 (Rs.56100-177500/-) for MBBS, Level 7 (Rs.44900-142400/-) for Non-Medical Qualification.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: University College of Medical Sciences Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
